text:
# mxlpy API reference

Version `0.52.0`.

- `mxlpy://api/carousel` ‚Äî Reaction carousel.
- `mxlpy://api/compare` ‚Äî Docstring.
- `mxlpy://api/composition` ‚Äî Hierarchical model composition.
- `mxlpy://api/databases` ‚Äî Model database integration for BioModels and JWS Online.
- `mxlpy://api/distributions` ‚Äî Probability Distribution Classes for Parameter Sampling.
- `mxlpy://api/dsl` ‚Äî String-based DSL for specifying reaction networks.
- `mxlpy://api/experimental` ‚Äî Experimental features for mxlpy.
- `mxlpy://api/experimental.diff` ‚Äî Diffing utilities for comparing models.
- `mxlpy://api/fit` ‚Äî Fitting routines.
- `mxlpy://api/fit.abstract` ‚Äî Fitting types.
- `mxlpy://api/fit.losses` ‚Äî Loss functions.
- `mxlpy://api/fit.residuals` ‚Äî Residual functions used for the different fittting approaches.
- `mxlpy://api/fns` ‚Äî Module containing functions for reactions and derived quatities.
- `mxlpy://api/fuzzy` ‚Äî Fuzzy / bayesian fitting methods.
- `mxlpy://api/identify` ‚Äî Numerical parameter identification estimations.
- `mxlpy://api/integrators` ‚Äî Integrator Package.
- `mxlpy://api/integrators.abstract` ‚Äî Integrator Interface.
- `mxlpy://api/integrators.int_assimulo` ‚Äî Assimulo integrator for solving ODEs.
- `mxlpy://api/integrators.int_diffrax` ‚Äî Diffrax integrator for solving ODEs.
- `mxlpy://api/integrators.int_scipy` ‚Äî Scipy integrator for solving ODEs.
- `mxlpy://api/integrators.utils` ‚Äî Utility fns for integrators.
- `mxlpy://api/jax` ‚Äî JAX integration modules for models and training utilities.
- `mxlpy://api/jax.models` ‚Äî JAX model classes for mechanistic and neural ODE components.
- `mxlpy://api/jax.train` ‚Äî Training loop utilities for JAX ODE and neural ODE models.
- `mxlpy://api/label_map` ‚Äî Label Mapping Module for Metabolic Models.
- `mxlpy://api/linear_label_map` ‚Äî Linear Label Mapping Module for Metabolic Models.
- `mxlpy://api/mc` ‚Äî Monte Carlo Analysis (MC) Module for Metabolic Models.
- `mxlpy://api/mca` ‚Äî Metabolic Control Analysis (MCA) Module.
- `mxlpy://api/meta` ‚Äî Metaprogramming facilities.
- `mxlpy://api/meta.codegen_latex` ‚Äî Export model to latex.
- `mxlpy://api/meta.codegen_mxlpy` ‚Äî Module to export models as code without the SymPy roundtrip.
- `mxlpy://api/meta.source_tools` ‚Äî Tools for working with python source files.
- `mxlpy://api/meta.sympy_tools` ‚Äî Tools for working with sympy expressions.
- `mxlpy://api/minimizers` ‚Äî Minimizers.
- `mxlpy://api/minimizers.abstract` ‚Äî Types for minimizers.
- `mxlpy://api/model` ‚Äî Model for Metabolic System Representation.
- `mxlpy://api/nn` ‚Äî Collection of neural network architectures.
- `mxlpy://api/npe` ‚Äî Neural Process Estimation (NPE) module.
- `mxlpy://api/npe.abstract` ‚Äî NPE Interface.
- `mxlpy://api/parallel` ‚Äî Parallel Execution Module.
- `mxlpy://api/parameterise` ‚Äî Module to parameterise models.
- `mxlpy://api/paths` ‚Äî Shared paths between the mxlpy package.
- `mxlpy://api/plot` ‚Äî Plotting Utilities Module.
- `mxlpy://api/report` ‚Äî Generate a report comparing two models.
- `mxlpy://api/sbml` ‚Äî SBML support for mxlpy.
- `mxlpy://api/scan` ‚Äî Parameter Scanning Module.
- `mxlpy://api/sensitivity` ‚Äî Global sensitivity analysis for mechanistic models.
- `mxlpy://api/serialize` ‚Äî Native JSON serialisation for MxlPy models.
- `mxlpy://api/simulation` ‚Äî Simulation results.
- `mxlpy://api/simulator` ‚Äî Simulation Module.
- `mxlpy://api/surrogates` ‚Äî Surrogate Models Module.
- `mxlpy://api/surrogates.abstract` ‚Äî Surrogate Interface.
- `mxlpy://api/symbolic` ‚Äî Symbolic utilities.
- `mxlpy://api/symbolic.strikepy` ‚Äî Reimplementation of strikepy from.
- `mxlpy://api/symbolic.symbolic_model` ‚Äî Conversions into symbolic representation.
- `mxlpy://api/types` ‚Äî Types Module.
- `mxlpy://api/unit_inference` ‚Äî Unit inference for MxlPy models via bidirectional constraint propagation.
- `mxlpy://api/units` ‚Äî Unit definitions for MxlPy.
